title: lasianthus oblongatus
intro: Lasianthus oblongatus is a species of plant in the family Theaceae, commonly known as the tea family, which is native to Southeast Asia and China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Lasianthus oblongatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and support immune function, as well as its potential to protect against certain diseases due to its antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Lasianthus oblongatus can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by extracting the plant's active compounds using solvents such as ethanol or methanol to create a tincture or extract.
